name: Fiddlehead & Onion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover chilled cooked fiddleheads and an equal amount of sliced, mild-flavored, raw onion rings with French dressing.
2. Marinate for several hours, covered and refrigerated, before serving.
From -The Wild Flavor by Marilyn Kluger. Los Angeles: Jeremy P. Tarcher, Inc., 1984. Pg. 250.
